name: vendor.myndhyve.ads-metrics-import
description: MyndHyve ads.metrics.import — pure-logic aggregation of ad metric snapshots. Caller supplies snapshots[]; pack filters by platformAdIds + optional platform/dateRange, validates each entry, and computes weighted aggregations (overallCtr / overallCpc / overallRoas / overallConversionRate + per-platform breakdown). Mirrors source AdMetricsService.getAggregatedMetrics math. No host capabilities required.
author: MyndHyve

nodes.label: Aggregate Ad Metrics
nodes.description: Inputs: snapshots[] (caller-supplied; from a platform-fetch node OR persistent store), platformAdIds[] (required filter), platform (optional filter), dateRange (optional exact-match filter — same key shape as source cache). Outputs: snapshots[] (filtered), aggregated (totalSpend/Impressions/Clicks/Conversions/ConversionValue + overall CTR/CPC/ROAS/ConversionRate + byPlatform map). Soft validation: invalid snapshots dropped with per-snapshot warnings; missing platformAdIds → INVALID_INPUTS pre-flight.
